description: Level warp/transition definitions — visual offsets and target areas.

SelectX.description: X pixel offset for the warp clickable selection area

SelectY.description: Y pixel offset for the warp clickable selection area

SelectDX.description: Width in pixels of the warp clickable selection area

SelectDY.description: Height in pixels of the warp clickable selection area

ExitWalkX.description: X tile offset where the player appears after warping

ExitWalkY.description: Y tile offset where the player appears after warping

OffsetX.description: X tile offset for the warp visual position

OffsetY.description: Y tile offset for the warp visual position

LitVersion.description: Whether this warp has an alternate lit (highlighted) visual version
